arts.ttl: Arsenal overtake Chelsea in race to sign 35 G/A wonderkid
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly among the potential transfer destinations for Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel, with Chelsea no longer an option for the player. Tel has struggled for playing time at Bayern recently, and it makes sense that his future is now looking in some doubt as we edge closer to the transfer deadline. arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal make Tel U-turn as Arteta targets January wonderkid move
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to make Bayern Munich an offer for striker Mathys Tel before the close of the January transfer window, FootballTransfers has been told by sources. The Emirates side had made Benjamin Sesko of RB Leipzig their ideal January signing, but the Bundesliga club are refusing to sell at this point while other targets such as Nico Williams and Viktor Gyokeres will not be up for sale until the summer either.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sent Darwin Nunez transfer message as radical striker solution emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal have been advised that a high-profile move for Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez could help the Gunners finally win the Premier League title

arts.ttl: Vivianne Miedema Admits Arsenal Exit Was Difficult, Grateful for Man City Move
arts.sum: The Netherlands international has opened up about her untimely Arsenal exit but says she has found a new lease on life in Manchester.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have ‘set their sights’ on 20-year-old – Gunners official sent at weekend
arts.sum: It seems rather unlikely that Arsenal will bolster their squad significantly in the ongoing January transfer window. That has not stopped the Gunners from looking around at future targets and one name that has impressed them is Como’s Nico Paz. arts.ttl: Sources: Arsenal eye signings as Sesko hopes fade
arts.sum: Arsenal are weighing up alternative attacking signings as their hopes fade of landing preferred target Benjamin Sesko this month, sources have told ESPN.
